g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Netflix app authenticate and request a stream?')
g.text: App sends play request + auth token

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Netflix API gateway do when you hit play?')
sendPrompt('How does Netflix DRM and license validation work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Netflix playback API decide?')
sendPrompt('How does Netflix use CDN Open Connect to deliver video?')
g.text: Nearest edge server streams video chunks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does adaptive bitrate streaming work in Netflix?')
sendPrompt('How does a device decode and decrypt a Netflix video stream?')
sendPrompt('What happens after Netflix decodes the video on your device?')

svg.text: End-to-end: typically under 2 seconds from tap to first frame
